in_scope: auditDeliverable reads canonical source readiness before approving downstream family work
runtimeWatch exposes shared source readiness plus export gate summaries across stable families
getReviewState and getPublicationProjection remain the canonical review and publication truth surfaces
review and export obligations stay hydrated from family contracts for ppt_deck and xiaohongshu
source readiness gating stays canonical via topics/<topic>/canonical/source-audit.json
out_of_scope: hidden fallback chains as main behavior

export_surfaces.hydration_rule: required_export_bundle stays hydrated from the deliverable contract instead of prompt-only inference

required_truth: formal entry remains MCP / CLI only
source readiness gate is enforced from canonical source-audit.json inside audit and watch surfaces
review_state and publication_projection remain the canonical governance truth surfaces
ppt_deck and xiaohongshu stay on the same substrate with hydrated export obligations
gate_surface.pass_condition: auditDeliverable blocks missing or blocked source readiness, and runtimeWatch surfaces the same authoritative source readiness summary plus export gate summary

required_commands: node --test tests/runtime-alignment-p0.test.ts tests/poster-production-hardening-freeze.test.ts tests/phase-2-source-intake-activation-package-freeze.test.ts tests/phase-2-source-intake-shared-source-truth-baseline.test.ts tests/phase-2-review-export-gate-audit-hardening.test.ts tests/deliverable-review-loop.test.ts tests/review-platform.test.ts tests/ppt-deliverable-surface.test.ts tests/harness-completion-audit.test.ts

must_record: review/export/gate/audit hardening has an absorbed tranche on the same mainline
auditDeliverable and runtimeWatch now surface canonical source readiness and export gate summaries
source readiness baseline remains absorbed provenance, not the whole longrun goal
must_not_claim: the whole review/export/gate/audit longrun goal is complete
RedCube AI became the whole OPL
managed web runtime migration is now the current repo truth
